page_metadata.biotools__summary: Convert a VCF file into a linkage pedigree file (ped) and a marker information file, which together may be loaded into ld visualization tools like Haploview.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Convert a VCF file into a linkage pedigree file (ped) and a marker information file, which together may be loaded into ld visualization tools like Haploview.
